candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches total revenue figures and is classic top-line revenue.
Explicit total revenue line equal to Operating revenue; good alternate label over time.
Adjustment/other income, not core recurring revenue; not suitable as main REVT.
Equity income from associates, below operating line; not revenue.
Tax related item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Both 'Total Revenue' and 'Operating revenue' represent the same top-line; providing both as a priority list for robustness over time.

candidates.why: Direct production cost; canonical COGS line.
Operating overhead personnel costs; better classified as SG&A, not COGS.
Mixed operating overhead; more SG&A than COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure cost-of-sales line.
Financial item, not COGS.
Financial item, not COGS.
Financial item, not COGS.
Non-operating, not COGS.
R&D expense, not cost of sales.
Asset account, not expense line.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS.

variables.notes: 'Cost of goods sold' is the clear direct cost-of-sales line and maps directly to COGS.

candidates.why: Personnel and salary costs typically part of SG&A overhead.
Overhead operating expenses, classic SG&A bucket.
Equity-based compensation, which is part of SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet intangible asset, not period SG&A expense.
Balance sheet PPE component, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Selected SG&A as component rows only, excluding any totals or balance sheet items, per instructions.

candidates.why: Tax credit related to R&D, not the underlying R&D expense itself.
Explicit R&D expense line; best match for XRD even if currently unpopulated in preview.

variables.notes: R&D expense is captured via the explicit 'Research and Development Expenses' line; the tax credit is not used as XRD.

candidates.why: Pre-interest earnings subtotal, not an interest expense line.
Net interest income; sign indicates opposite of expense but may flip by year; used if no specific expense rows available.
Aggregated net interest expense line; valid XINT candidate but less granular than specific components.
Specific interest expense component on long-term loans; ideal primary XINT line.
Specific interest expense component; part of total interest expense.
Specific interest expense component; part of total interest expense.
Specific interest on lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Profit attribution, not interest expense.
Profit attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; valid if primary interest lines missing.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity attribution, not interest.
Equity attribution, not interest.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of specific interest expense components first, followed by the aggregate net interest expenses and supplemental/net lines, so later processing can pick the first available value each year.

candidates.row_label: Change in Tax Rate on Equity Posted PPA in Prior Years
candidates.why: Adjustment item, not a balance sheet equity total.
Component of equity but not the total attributable to owners; less suitable than the total owners’ equity line.
Specific equity reserve, not total equity.
Total equity attributable to owners/parent; excludes non-controlling interests as shown by reconciliation with 'Total equity'. Ideal BE line.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; would double-count with MIB, so not preferred for BE.

variables.notes: 'Total Equity' is the equity attributable to owners (excludes non-controlling interests); 'Total equity' includes NCI and is therefore not used for BE.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to NCI; indicates presence of minorities but equity amount is better taken from balance sheet.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests in income statement context.
Balance sheet line for NCI; primary source for minority equity (MIB).
Duplicate/synonym balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; useful as alternative over time.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet minority equity lines, providing both 'Non-controlling interests' and 'Minority Interest' as a priority list for historical label changes.
